nodes.title: Add autoupdate support to manifest
nodes.body:
Resolves cli/cli#1684

Test locally using checkver.ps1 according to https://github.com/lukesampson/scoop/wiki/App-Manifest-Autoupdate#using-checkverps1-to-query-and-autoupdate

Thanks for proposing this! I'm not sure if this is a good idea, since we now have two update checkers: one baked into the `gh` binary (you saw that one) and, with this, the performed by scoop as configured here. I don't think two update checkers running independently of each other would be a great experience for our users.

As a scoop user, would you prefer that scoop checks for updates, or the binary itself?

nodes.title: add note + update to v0.12.0
nodes.body: Same as #7 but with a note that this bucket isn't going to be maintained and how to use the [Main bucket](https://github.com/ScoopInstaller/Main) instead. Please ignore this if this is going to be maintained (even though it is already on the [Main bucket](https://github.com/ScoopInstaller/Main) which is up to date. See [my other PR](https://github.com/cli/cli/pull/1689) for more information.
